steps.title: Solve for $k$
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $3k$: $2 \cdot 3k = 24$, giving $6k = 24$, so $k = 4$.

steps.title: Check the answer choices
steps.content:
• A. $0.75$ — gives $3k = 2.25$, ratio $24/2.25 \approx 10.7 eq 2$; eliminated.
  • B. $4$ — gives $3k = 12$, ratio $24/12 = 2$; matches.
  • C. $12$ — gives $3k = 36$, ratio $24/36 \approx 0.67 eq 2$; eliminated.
  • D. $72$ — gives $3k = 216$, ratio $24/216 \approx 0.11 eq 2$; eliminated.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
